svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="鲁班多仓分工" id="lowcodeRepo"> <mxGraphModel dx="-434" dy="-127" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="460" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="鲁班多仓分工：meta 仓 + submodule 统一治理，前端只管渲染、BFF 管认证、后端管领域" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="580" x="170" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ENGINE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="luban（引擎/设计器）
Vue3.5 + Vite
拖拽编辑 + schema 生成" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="40" y="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="WEB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="luban-website（对外站点）
Nuxt3 SSR
拉 schema → LubanPage 渲染" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="40" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="UI" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="luban-ui（物料库）
base / low-code / utils
RuntimeRenderer + LubanPage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="300" y="107" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BFF" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="luban-bff（Next.js）
签 JWT → 注入 X-User-ID/Role
callBackend（15s 超时）
短链 / AI 代理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="560" y="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="luban-backend（Spring Boot）
publicside / operatorside / shared 三侧
pages(草稿) + published_pages(发布快照)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="560" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="MySQL
sites / pages / published_pages
users / system_settings" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="560" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AI" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="luban-ai-assistant
读物料 propsSchema
自然语言生成页面" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="300" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ENGINE" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="UI"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="WEB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="UI"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="WEB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=9;" target="BFF" value="public 接口"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="BFF" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;fontSize=9;" target="BE" value="X-User-ID/Role"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="BE" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;" target="DB"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="AI" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;dashed=1;" target="BFF"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;" value="link 消费 luban-ui" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="14" width="140" x="100" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="草稿/发布物理分离：对外读 published_pages，运营改草稿不影响线上" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="640" x="140" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
